hotel_name: FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhơn - View Biển

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I booked with 3 adults but they gave us  1 bed, the booking picture shows 2 beds, we end up paying additional 100k vnd per night.  there is not enough elevators for the building.  busy all day and night, hard to get in & out of the building, facility suck as well.  the unit itself isn't that clean anyway,
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Say No to Room 2910
reviews.text: A very disappointing stay which ruined our time in Quy Nhon. A supposed self contained unit had 1 coffee cup for 2 people, no drinking glasses and 1 dirty old pot to cook with. The freezer did not freeze anything, in fact we bought ice and it melted in the freezer, the fridge was even worse as it didn't seem to work at all - we had to throw out milk and fruit which spoiled. We asked one of the staff to report the fridge freezer problems which they did, but we never heard back again. The toilet seat was broken and detached from the toilet bowl, the bidet leaked everywhere and the shower / bath combination leaked through the tiles. They even had a queen size fitted sheet on a king size bed. There was no planned cleaning of the room - on the 3rd day we asked a cleaner for fresh towels - she said 'no'. We went to reception and insisted the room be cleaned, they arranged it to be done on that day but none turned up. They had a swimming pool that did not open until 2.00pm and then they wanted charge guests to use the pool. The place was terrible and we will never go back there. We certainly would not recommend anybody stay there - particularly room 2910
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: No staff to support you. Elevators r overcrowded. I used stairs instead of elevators to get down from 17th floors since the elevators were very crowded for 20 minutes waiting.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Ok for 1 night, there is no pool, the building is unfinished,  maybe they ran out of money. The room we had had a hotplate, but no utensils other than a knife and a spoon.  The was one plate a few bowls and one frying pan. There was no soap for washing dishes and no towels for washing and drying dishes . The person at the front is of no help whatsoever,  7ou are not her problem,  she wants nothing to do with guests renting apartments. The beds were very hard. The only good thing is the location.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Not good experience
reviews.text:
The building located near the beach, easy to walk, many shops around
However, the room was very old, broken door handle, the host only give one key card for elevator + electrical in the room so if one person needs to go down to buy something the room completely shut down the electrical. 
Not convenient for family, won't come back here again and won't recommend for friends/family.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Not as pictured
reviews.text: Room is in a nice building in central part of town. But room is nowhere as pictured in Agoda.  Room is built as modern but  Furniture is subpar, broke sofa bed clumped together with some ottoman in front of bed. No curtain nor door at all in shower so water is everywhere after a shower.  Communication is lacking, had to contact owners several time regarding instructions for late check in.  No instruction for where to leave keys. Front desk refused to take keys. Do not recommend this place
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Advantages: spacious room, sea-facing balcony, amenities such as blankets, towels, and toothbrushes like in 2-3 star hotels.  
Disadvantages: On arrival, it was not a hotel, there was no reception to welcome guests, and there was no one to clean the room daily. The wifi was extremely weak, sometimes available, sometimes not.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Tạm
reviews.text:
Nếu bạn cần chỗ ở thuận tiện đi lại gần trung tâm thì có thể lựa chọn nơi đây. Tuy nhiên ngoài phòng ở ra thì không có các tiện ích nào khác (hồ bơi, gym hoặc khu vực cho trẻ em).
Không dành cho ai thích sạch sẽ vì chỉ vệ sinh ở mức tạm, phòng ở đây có gián con và máy giặt rất dơ.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Family Trip Experiance
reviews.text: First I would like to say that the location was perfect. a 5 minute walk from the beach. Lots of restaurants and bars a few steps away from the building. If you want to rent motorbikes you can do so downstairs. just speak with the security guard and they can help you. So let start with the room. We traveled with 8 people and a baby. I ended up renting a 3 bedroom apartment. the photo that was listed on this site was not the actual apartment we got. Apparently these photos listed on here are just samples because we got a completely different apartment. At first glance everything was clean the beds were made and there was a washer for your beach clothes but no dryer, so please be advise you'll have to hang dry your wet clothes. the kitchen counter had lot of ants when we arrived which we needed up having to wipe down a few times a day because of the ants.  Check in was basically calling the number on your reservation and a person will meet you in the lobby and walk you up to your apartment. if you do end up arriving before the time your able to check in. The receptionist in the lobby will not assist you in storing your luggage you will need to call the number on your booking for help.  Our stay was okay. we had to buy our own toilet paper the last two days of our stay since there is no maid service like what you would get at a hotel. the day we left I accidently left my apple air pods on one of the beds.  I only found down when I landed back in ho chi minh city that I checked the location and it shows the air pods were still in the apartment in which I called the person that helped us check into the apartment but no one answered, so I ended up sending him a text message regarding it. He stated that he will let the maid know and I have not heard from him since.  I assume the air pods were long gone and had no shot at getting it back but a follow up from him would have been appreciated. Overall, I would stay here if I was going with a large group since its convenient to have everyone in the same apartment to all hang out together but if I was traveling with less then 4 people I would suggest a hotel for the amenities
reviews.room_type: Three-Bedroom Ocean View Apartment

reviews.title: Suitable for temporary family vacation.
reviews.text: The location is very close to the beach. The cleanliness is decent. The room is spacious, has a balcony, a washing machine, and is near dining areas so it can be a bit noisy at night and has a convenient mini supermarket. Improvement is needed for public sanitation; there is often trash in the hallway. It is recommended to choose a room facing east to enjoy the sunrise.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Non Raccomando
reviews.text:
Non sapevo fosse un Airbnb situato al 28 piano di una torre enorme non ce reception no assistenza pulizia da migliorare. Va bene per le famiglie di vietnamiti.
La colpa e' anche di Agoda quando ho controllato Agoda Home non lo sapevo
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: It was okay to stay but not the best.
reviews.text: It was really nice to see the ocean from the balcony, and it was good to have enough space for two people. However, we only had 2 towels for 3 nights and 4 days, and we only received one roll of toilet paper and just 2 bottles of water. I wanted to request a few more items for convenience, but it wasn't easy to communicate with the owner. I sent an email about it, and the owner responded, but nothing changed. In the end, we tried to contact the building employees directly, but it was also difficult because they didn’t speak English very well. It would have been nicer if the owner had tried to address the request directly.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel provides a very satisfactory stay experience, with a strong impression right from the clean reception area and friendly, professional staff. The rooms are clean, fully equipped, and have a comfortable space that ensures a good night's sleep for guests. The attentive service from the enthusiastic staff, along with well-maintained amenities such as the pool, is a significant plus. The hotel's location is convenient, making it easy to travel to tourist attractions and dining and shopping areas. With these advantages, this is a great choice and highly recommended for travelers.

reviews.text: The apartment is good and clean, but the description states that there is free parking, yet there is never a parking space available (both in the parking garage and around the building), and you have to pay 70k/night to park outside. Anyone with a car should consider this.

reviews.title: Evaluation of FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhơn
reviews.text: I am very satisfied with my vacation at FLC Sea Tower. The apartment is spacious, clean, fully equipped, with a beautiful balcony overlooking the sea. The location is close to the beach, convenient for visiting famous attractions in Quy Nhon. The staff is friendly, and the service is good. The prices are reasonable compared to the quality. I will come back on future trips!
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Wonderful, worth experiencing!
reviews.text: I am very satisfied with my stay at the FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhơn apartment. The apartment is spacious, modern, fully equipped, and has a beautiful sea view. The location is very convenient, just a few minutes' walk from the beach. The service here is also very good, with friendly and enthusiastic staff. The price is reasonable compared to the quality. This is a great choice for a relaxing vacation in Quy Nhơn. I will definitely come back!
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon apartment has a great location, close to the beach and famous tourist attractions. The apartment is clean, spacious, and fully equipped with modern amenities such as a kitchen, washing machine, TV, and high-speed wifi. The service here is very professional and friendly, especially the infinity pool with a beautiful view. I am very satisfied and will definitely come back.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Amazing holiday at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon
reviews.text: FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhơn is a great choice for a vacation in the coastal city. The hotel is ideally located just a few steps from the beach and close to famous attractions. The apartments are spacious, modern, fully equipped with comfortable space and a balcony overlooking the sea. The service here is excellent, with friendly and enthusiastic staff. Amenities such as the pool, gym, and restaurant are all of high quality. If you are looking for a relaxing, luxurious, and convenient place, FLC Sea Tower is the ideal choice!
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Good to go in a group.
reviews.text:
Suitable for families or large groups of friends. 
Good location, convenient transportation. 
Contact the host via the phone number on Agoda for check-in/check-out, not through the reception. 
Spacious area, fully equipped for living. 
I didn't have any issues with the elevator (I visited on Sunday-Monday). 
Good price.
reviews.room_type: Three-Bedroom Ocean View Apartment

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text:
FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhơn is the ideal choice for those who want to enjoy a vacation in this coastal city. With a prime location near the beach, the building offers a comfortable, convenient, and luxurious vacation space.

The apartments are designed modernly with full amenities such as air conditioning, flat-screen TV, refrigerator, and washing machine. A major plus is that all apartments have balconies with stunning sea views. Amenities like an infinity pool, gym, spa, and restaurant are also very popular.

The service at FLC Sea Tower is very professional and friendly, with enthusiastic staff support. Rooms are always kept clean, ensuring comfort for guests.

With its convenient living space, ideal location, and high-quality service, FLC Sea Tower is a great choice for a vacation in Quy Nhơn.

reviews.title: Very Satisfied
reviews.text: I had a wonderful vacation at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon. The room was clean, spacious, and well-equipped, with a beautiful sea view. The hotel service was excellent, with friendly and enthusiastic staff. The location of the hotel was very convenient, close to famous tourist attractions and the beach. The breakfast was rich and delicious. I will definitely return if I have the chance to visit Quy Nhon again!

reviews.title: Highest building  FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhơn

There is big grocery store with Jolie bee about 10 min walk. Their lots of great restaurants around the hotel, their lots of taxis waiting, it’s like Waikiki in Vietnam ocean to Mountain View, beach just across the street, and lots of pho, ban mi sandwich, ice coffee about 1-3 usd.  Yen Vy Spa Great Thai massage around the corner about $12 usd per hour.

Not everything you might need is there in the kitchen but if you bring forks, spoons and a (sharp) knife with you, it should do (no rice cooker though).  The location is great as well, it's near the beach, near the supermarket, close to the old city center and surrounded by restaurants. I'd definitely go back and can recommend it.

reviews.title: 일주일 예약했다가 하루만에 도망?
reviews.text: 여기는 개미랑 흰거미 작은것들이 살아요. 주방은 사용 할 생각두 하지 말아야...개미랑 흰개미가 불만이면 본인들은 방법 없다며 환불 해 주겠다고...일주일 예약했다가 하루 억지로 지내고 환불받구 도망침.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: 방 넓고 전망은 좋은데 관리가 잘 안되는거  같아요.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: 감사합니다
reviews.text: 청소 미흡하고 건물공사로 인해 시끄러웠습니다
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: 솔로 여행객에게는 별로
reviews.text:
혼자라면 별로입니다.
쓸데없이 크다고 할까요.
샤워도 불편하고 밥해먹을 것도 아닌데.. 주방시설은 불필요(식기들이 별로 쓰고 싶게 관리되지도 않음). 딱 좋은 크기에 호텔이 훨 나음. 물 수건 청소 등등 여러 면에서!
인원이 많으면(4인가족. 아이들이 크면 별로) 그리 나쁘지않음.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: 가격 대비 굿!
reviews.text: 금액만 보고 FLc니 좋네요.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

방넓고 뷰좋고 가성비 좋습니다.

reviews.title: FLC 아파트

reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: 特别糟糕的清洁和服务！！！！
reviews.text: 一进门扑面而来的榴莲味和一种难以形容的发霉的气息，并且马上在枕头上发现不属于我们的毛发，告诉酒店客服，客服不理人！！当我们收拾好行李准备洗澡时，门铃响了，我们没有去开门但是外面的人通过门锁密码解锁并准备进来了！我为我们的安全感到担忧，所有的情况我都告知了酒店工作人员！！他们不理人！！！！特别特别坏的一次旅行体验！毁了我的假期
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: thu phí giá cao
reviews.text: giá phụ phí không hợp lý, không có chính sách rõ ràng, không báo từ ban đầu
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Chúng tôi đên nói, đợi 30p ko có ng đưa chìa khoá. Ko có chỗ đỗ xe, chủ nhà nói tự đanh xe ra chỗ công trường đỗ bừa. Vậy xe của khách ai trông.
Chúng t đành bỏ để ra Khách sạn ở
Mất tiền ngày hôm đó. Vừa mất tiền vừa bực mà ko đc lời nào từ chủ và tiền cũng ko đc hoàn 1 xu 
Thất vọng dã man
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Dịch vụ khá tệ
reviews.text: Dịch vụ khá tệ, ở 4 ngày nhưng k được đến vệ sinh phòng, đồ dùng trong phòng không được sạch sẽ.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Vệ sinh kém

reviews.title: Quá tệ
reviews.text: Phòng ở 3 đêm k hề có người dọn dẹp và thay đổi khăn trong phòng quá tệ
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Quá tệ về vệ sinh và dịch vụ
reviews.text: Mn lưu ý số điện thoại liên hệ của mỗi book nha. Các lần trước mình đi đều ok nên cho rằng sdt nào cũng như nhau. Tuy nhiên, book này rất tệ. Mình xuống hỏi nhận phòng sớm ko có. Mình vẫn theo quy định nhận phòng đến 14g bạn đưa cho mình khoá phòng lên thì chưa dọn dẹp xong. Mình đã đồng ý chuyển sang căn 2 giường (book mình đặt căn 2 phòng ngủ). Chuyển căn mới thì tivi hư màn hình, wifi ko có phải bắt nhờ các phòng khác. Bạn nhân viên có nói sẽ hoàn lại tiền lệch hạng phòng cho mình. Nhưng nhắn tin ko hề phản hồi lại. Nếu ko có tâm làm ơn đừng làm dịch vụ.
reviews.room_type: Two-Bedroom Ocean View Apartment

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Giá cao. Phòng ẩm mốc. Cân nhắc khi đặt phòng.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Dirty. Full of ants
reviews.text: Absolutely dirty. Ants on beds and they bite while we slept. The floor was so dirty. Bath towels were so disgusting.
reviews.room_type: Two-Bedroom Ocean View Apartment

reviews.title: NÂNG CAO PHỤC VỤ TỰ ĐỘNG
reviews.text:
Mọi thứ ko dc tự động hoá
Phòng không được dọn dẹp hàng ngày, 4 Ngày ở mới kêu dọn thì dọn, nước uống chỉ cấp ngày đầu duy nhất, căn hộ ko có sự tiện ghi cho việc nấu ăn thêm gì. quá thất vọng. thứ cần thiết thì xin mới cho như nước rửa chén, nước giặt quần áo, Ti vi báo ko mở được mới lên thay cục pin bị hỏng từ đời nào. Tóm lại ko có sự chuẩn bị chu đáo trước
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Toà nhà căn hộ rất xô bồ, ban đêm có người cố gắng bấm mã cửa vào. Các giờ sáng và chiều khi mọi người đi tắm biển về -> thang máy kẹt, ồn ào, đông phát hoảng.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Phòng này không đạt tiêu chuẩn để khai thác
reviews.text: Tôi đã thuê 2 phòng khá rộng rãi nhưng vệ sinh thì thật là kinh tởm. Ghế sa-lông thì ránh nách. Phòng vệ sinh thì cáu bẩn, mốc đen. Trần nhà thì bị hổng 1 lỗ to không che đậy.,.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Phòng dơ, không có chỗ đậu xe
reviews.text: Đồ ăn thừa và rác còn rải rác khắp phòng khi mình check in, cảm giác như không được vệ sinh. Nội thất cũ và kiếm được chỗ đậu xe là cực hình

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Đoàn mình đến hơi muộn check in không có người hướng dẫn, phải liên hệ qua điện thoại và chờ khá lâu.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Balcony

reviews.title: Phòng nghỉ này không nên bán cho khách
reviews.text: Phòng nghỉ rộng rãi nhưng rất cẩu thả, cáu bẩn mất vệ sinh: mốc đen bám xung quanh bồn rửa tay trong phòng tắm; các gioăng xung quanh bồn tắm cáu bẩn vàng khè. Các hộc tủ rỉ sét và còn nhiều vật dụng đã sử dụng, xé rách, tăm bông… của khách trước để lại…Chăn nệm hình như chưa khô, có mùi ẩm mốc rất đáng sợ
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Phòng ở đây vì là căn hộ nên đc cái rộng rãi, 2 giường 1m6, gia đình 4bg ngủ thoải mái; giao thông khá thuận tiện, gần biển nhưng mình ko thích lắm vì ko có tiện ích gì, ko ăn sáng, ko free bể bơi, nội thất trong phòng cũng khá cũ, thang máy thì đợi lòi mắt, hành lang ko có tí điều hoà nào. Chắc sẽ ko quay lại
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed

Lâu lâu đi công tác mà làm thất vọng ghê. Bù lại nhân viên ok, nhiệt tình hỗ trợ khách, vui vẻ, lịch sự

reviews.title: EVERYTHING PERFECT IS ALREADY HERE
reviews.text:
Okayy sau chuyến đi 5 ngày 4 đêm ở Quy Nhơn thì mình cũng có đôi lời nhận xét công tâm về căn mình thuê - FLC Sea Tower căn Studio:

- Về vị trí địa lý: ngay trung tâm TP. Quy Nhơn, trước mặt là biển. Xung quanh nhiều chỗ ăn uống ngon lắm luônnnn

- Về tiện nghi: chỉ cần dọn đồ vô là ở, ở đây có tất cả đồ mọi người cần: dao cạo râu, lifebuoy rửa tay,  dầu gội, sữa tắm, bàn chải, kem đánh răng, nước rửa chén, máy sấy, bàn ủi, bếp (đầy đủ đồ như nồi cơm điện, nồi chảo, muỗng đũa, tô chén dĩa, bếp điện từ), tủ lạnh nguyên seal còn mới (để nước qua đêm là đông cứng), tivi (dùng được Netflix và YouTube, ai thích Netflix and chill thì book lẹ đi ạ),  máy giặt (đi biển xong về giặt đồ treo lên là có đồ sạch liền), sọt đựng đồ dơ, bộ bàn ghế ban công, bộ bàn ghế sofa, bàn ghế ăn, bàn trang điểm, gương trang điểm có đèn để mọi người dễ trang điểm ó, khăn giấy vệ sinh.

- Về độ sạch sẽ: mọi thứ sạch sẽ, không có cảm giác sợ chạm đồ ở khách sạn.

- Về Staff: anh Thương nhiệt tình hỗ trợ nhận & trả phòng, hỗ trợ thuê xe máy, hỗ trợ các thắc mắc cũng như giúp đỡ khách thuê rất tận tình. 

- Về độ đáng tiền: 5⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ không nói nhiều. Ai đi Quy Nhơn thì ở FLC Sea Tower đi ạ

Lời cuối,  cảm ơn anh Thương đã giúp mình có chuyến đi 100% hoàn hảo ❤️
reviews.room_type: Sea View Studio with Double Bed
